# RC Web Solutions LLC

> Houston, TX web developer specializing in custom websites and web applications for small businesses. Built with Next.js, React, and TypeScript. Bilingual English & Spanish. Latino-owned.

## About

RC Web Solutions LLC is a professional web development company based in Houston, Texas, founded by Randy Caballero. We build high-performance, custom websites and web applications for small businesses, with a focus on the Houston Hispanic market. Every project is built with modern technology (Next.js, React, TypeScript) and includes local SEO, mobile-first design, and bilingual capabilities.

- Website: https://rcweb.dev
- Phone: +1 (346) 375-7534
- Email: contactus@rcweb.dev
- Location: Houston, TX, USA
- Languages: English, Spanish (native)
- Founded: 2022

## Founder

Randy Caballero is a full-stack web developer with a Bachelor of Software Engineering from Universidad de Camaguey (Cuba) and a Master of Science from Nova Southeastern University. Based in Houston, TX since 2022. Experience includes freelance web development, software development at Atser Technologies Inc., and training at Revature.

## Services

### Web Design & Landing Pages — from $800
Custom, mobile-first websites optimized for conversions and lead generation. Includes responsive design, SEO, fast loading (under 2 seconds), and contact forms. Delivery: 1-2 weeks.

### Professional Business Website — from $2,500
Complete 5-10 page websites with custom design, SEO optimization, analytics integration, and 30 days of post-launch support. Delivery: 3-4 weeks.

### Bilingual Websites (English & Spanish) — from $800
Native Spanish localization (not machine translation) with proper hreflang tags, bilingual SEO, and cultural context for Houston's Hispanic community. 44% of Houston's population is Hispanic.

### E-Commerce Website Development — from $6,000
Custom online stores with Stripe payment processing, inventory management, customer accounts, order tracking, and admin dashboard. No monthly platform fees. Delivery: 6-10 weeks.

### Custom Business Management Dashboard — from $5,000
Tailored admin dashboards with custom forms, data visualization, email automation, user management, and database integration. Delivery: 5-6 weeks.

### Website Redesign and Modernization — from $3,000
Transform outdated websites into modern, high-performance platforms. Includes content migration, SEO preservation, and performance optimization. Delivery: 4-6 weeks.

### Custom Web Application Development — from $8,000
Full-stack platforms with user authentication, database architecture, API development, third-party integrations, and 6 months of priority support. Delivery: 8-12+ weeks.

### Monthly Website Maintenance & SEO — from $200/month
Security updates, performance monitoring, content updates, local SEO optimization, backup management, and same-day response for urgent issues.

## Technology Stack

Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Prisma, Docker, AWS, MongoDB, MySQL, Zod, Zustand, Framer Motion, Stripe, Resend, Cloudinary

## Payment Structure

50% upfront to start, 50% upon completion. Payment plans available for projects over $3,000. Accepted: Credit Card, Debit Card, Zelle (via Stripe).

## Client Portfolio

### Healthcare (Bilingual)
- Clinica Hispana Gessner — https://www.clinicagessner.com/ — Bilingual website for Houston Hispanic clinic with appointment booking, lead capture, and local SEO. Case study: https://rcweb.dev/case-study/clinica-gessner
- Clinica Hispana Airline — https://www.clinicahispanaairline.com/ — Bilingual clinic website targeting the Hispanic community near Airline Drive, Houston. Case study: https://rcweb.dev/case-study/clinica-airline

### HVAC & Contractors
- GSM A/C & General Contractor — https://www.gsmactx.com/ — Custom website with admin dashboard and bulk email campaigns for Houston HVAC company. Saves 15+ hours/week. Case study: https://rcweb.dev/case-study/gsmactx

### Home Services
- Leo's Home Experts — https://www.ac-remodelingservice.com/ — Landing page for Houston home services company (patios, motorized screens, awnings) with video gallery and local SEO. Case study: https://rcweb.dev/case-study/leos-home-experts

### Food & Events
- Dulce Antojo Snack Carts — https://www.dulcesantojosnackcarts.com/ — Conversion-optimized landing page for Houston snack cart rental business with 13+ service options. Case study: https://rcweb.dev/case-study/dulce-antojo

### Beauty & Wellness
- RC Beauty Salon — https://www.rcbeautysalon.org/ — Modern beauty salon website with online bookings, service showcases, and Cloudinary image management.

## Client Testimonials

"Randy transformed our business with a complete website rebuild. The custom admin dashboard saves 15 hours per week on administrative tasks. Randy was professional, communicative, and delivered on time. Highly recommend RC Web Solutions to any Houston business." — Michel Chapelli, GSM A/C & General Contractor Inc. (5 stars)

"Working with Randy was a great experience. He was professional, responsive, and really took the time to understand my business. The website turned out clean, modern, and easy for customers to use." — Leonardo Lecour Acosta, Leo's Home Experts (5 stars)

"Excellent experience with website development. Professional, responsible, and technically skilled. Delivered on time, optimized speed and SEO structure, and was always willing to improve details." — Yoannis Aguilar Fonseca (5 stars)

## Areas Served

Houston metropolitan area including: Downtown Houston, The Heights, Katy, Sugar Land, Cypress, Spring, Pearland, Pasadena, The Woodlands, East Houston, Bellaire, Missouri City, Richmond, Humble, League City. Remote services available nationwide.

We publish articles on web development, SEO, and digital strategy for Houston business owners:

Full blog: https://rcweb.dev/blog

## Development Process

1. Discovery (Week 1) — Requirements analysis, competition research, detailed proposal, transparent quote
2. Design & Planning (Weeks 1-2) — Interactive mockups, tech stack selection, project timeline, review & feedback
3. Iterative Development (Weeks 2-5) — Weekly sprints, Friday demos, continuous testing, real-time adjustments
4. Launch & Support (Week 6) — Secure deployment, complete training, documentation, post-launch support

## Key Differentiators

- Bilingual (English/Spanish native) — serves Houston's 44% Hispanic population
- Latino-owned business in Houston, TX
- Modern tech stack (Next.js, React, TypeScript) — same technology used by Nike, Netflix, Twitch
- Transparent 50/50 pricing — no hidden fees
- Client portal for real-time project tracking
- 95+ Lighthouse performance scores
- Websites load in under 2 seconds
- All clients retain full code ownership

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Do you work with clients outside the USA?
A: Yes. Projects are fully remote using Zoom and Slack. Payments through Stripe work worldwide.

Q: How long does a typical project take?
A: Landing pages: 1-2 weeks. Business websites: 3-4 weeks. Admin dashboards: 5-6 weeks. E-commerce: 6-10 weeks. Web applications: 8-12+ weeks.

Q: Do you offer post-launch support?
A: Yes. Every project includes free post-launch support (30 days to 6 months depending on the plan). Optional maintenance starts at $200/month.

Q: How does payment work?
A: 50% upfront, 50% upon completion. Payment plans available for projects over $3,000. Pay via Zelle or Stripe.

Q: Can I see progress during development?
A: Yes. Weekly progress updates, staging environment access, and 24-hour response time.
